Download
Everything Included

Features

Every component chosen with intent. From the compositor to the cursor, nothing is default — everything is deliberate.

Compositor

Hyprland, Configured for Speed

Not stock Hyprland — HyprSpaceOS ships with 200+ lines of curated config. Every bezier curve tuned by hand, every keybind mapped with intention. Blur, shadows, animations, window rules — all pre-configured and ready.

  • Custom bezier curves (overshot, smooth)
  • 12px rounding with 8px blur / 3 passes
  • Window rules for float, opacity, and positioning
  • Pre-bound keybinds: Super+Q kill, Super+F fullscreen

Screenshot

Replace with actual image

Ecosystem

Apps That Belong Together

Kitty terminal with GPU acceleration. Waybar with custom modules for workspaces, tray, clock, and CPU. Rofi launcher with fuzzy search and clipboard history. Dunst notifications with glass-style popups. They ship together, they work together.

  • Kitty terminal with custom keybinds and theme
  • Waybar: workspaces, system tray, clock, CPU/RAM
  • Rofi launcher with clipboard manager
  • Dunst with glassmorphism notifications

Screenshot

Replace with actual image

Foundation

Arch, But You Don't Have to Build It

Arch Linux is the best distro — if you have 3 hours to set it up. HyprSpaceOS gives you the same rolling-release, AUR-powered foundation with a custom Calamares installer, pre-configured Btrfs snapshots, ZRAM compression, and a tuned kernel. No assembly required.

  • Calamares installer (custom branded)
  • Btrfs with automatic snapshots + compression
  • ZRAM for compressed memory swapping
  • Pre-tuned kernel with low-latency desktop patches

Screenshot

Replace with actual image

The Actual Config

No black box. Here's exactly what ships.

~/.config/hypr/hyprland.conf
  
   
 
  
 
 
  
 
Stack
 
From kernel to clipboard — every layer visible.
 
  
   
  
 
 
 
 
 Kernel Linux 6.14 LTS 
 
 
 
 Compositor Hyprland 0.48.x 
 
 
 
 Display Wayland (no X11 fallback) 
 
 
 
 Boot systemd-boot 
 
 
 
 FS Btrfs + ZRAM 
 
 
 
 PKG pacman + yay 
 
 
 
 Shell Zsh + powerlevel10k 
 
 
 
 Term Kitty 
 
 
 
 Bar Waybar 
 
 
 
 Launch Rofi 
 
 
 
 Notify Dunst 
 
 
 
 Wall swww 
 
 
 
 Clip wl-clipboard + cliphist 
 
 
 
 Shot grim + slurp + swappy 
 
 
 
  
   
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
How We Compare
 
Other distros are fine. This one is intentional.
 
  
   
  
 
  
 Aspect HyprSpaceOS Arch Endeavour Garuda 
   
 Base     
 Hyprland pre-tuned     
 Calamares installer     
 Btrfs snapshots     
 Glassmorphism theme     
 AUR pre-configured     
 Boot under 5s     
 ZRAM pre-enabled     
  
 
  
   
  

Comparisons based on latest stable releases. Your mileage may vary.
